http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/15183/ : SUCCESS

Patch Set 2: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

I don't think this is quite correct.

The label parsing is a bit unpleasant, since it is possible to have a dash in the fsname itself... That is why all the scanning is done with strrchr() instead of strchr(). Also, the fsname/target separator may be either '-' or ':' depending on whether the target is registered or not.

It probably makes more sense to search for the end of the target (e.g. NUL string or whitespace) and then continue to use strrchr() to find the separator. 

It would also be good to add all of this to a comment block in the code so it is more clear.

parents.subject: LU-3357 mgs: Initialize uuid of llogs created by replace_nids

commit.subject: LU-2200 obdclass: be more careful processing server name
commit.message:
LU-2200 obdclass: be more careful processing server name

Because whole options line gets passed to exclude processing, don't
search from end of passed in argument to determine fsname at
beginning.

Re-enable conf-sanity/32 but do replace_nids on IB.

Test-Parameters: nettypes=o2ib testlist=conf-sanity
Signed-off-by: Nathaniel Clark <nathaniel.l.clark@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ibc43417cb71581198e3516c1e431c0d3f668f1e0
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/6197
Tested-by: Hudson
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <whamcloud.maloo@gmail.com>
